ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the blog post */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly slug for the post */,
  "image" TEXT /* Path to the featured image associated with the post */,
  "height_field" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "width_field" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "content" TEXT /* Main content of the blog post */,
  "draft" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the post is a draft */,
  "publish" TEXT /* Publication date of the post */,
  "read_time" INTEGER /* Estimated read time in minutes */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was last updated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the post was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or edited the post */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the post */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (draft, pending review, published) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score of the post */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Average time users spend on the post */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to social media posts for easy sharing and promotion */,
  "seo_keywords" TEXT /* SEO keywords for the post */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (content creator, editor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the posts table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the posts table */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the tags table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)
